itemLimit.title: Item Limit
itemLimit.tooltip: The number of items you can store in the backpack. Setting this to -1 will give you unlimited storage. This will only change at the start of the loop.

unpackKeybind.title: Unpack Keybind
unpackKeybind.tooltip: Sets the keybind that should place down the backpack. Change this if you encounter mod conflicts.

enableMapMarker.title: Enable HUD Marker
enableMapMarker.tooltip: Shows you where the backpack is when you place it down so that you don't lose it.
